briefdescription.para: Acquire SPI semaphore.
Release SPI semaphore, enabling the SPI slave to acquire it.
Enable SPI pattern matching functionality for pattern 0.
Enable SPI pattern matching functionality for pattern 1.
Enable SPI pattern matching functionality for pattern 2.
Enable SPI pattern matching functionality for pattern 3.
Disable SPI pattern matching functionality for pattern 0.
Disable SPI pattern matching functionality for pattern 1.
Disable SPI pattern matching functionality for pattern 2.
Disable SPI pattern matching functionality for pattern 3.
SPIS tasks.
Receive sequence started.
Memory bus error occurred during the RX transfer.
Pattern match for pattern 0 detected.
Pattern match for pattern 1 detected.
Pattern match for pattern 2 detected.
Pattern match for pattern 3 detected.
Transmit sequence started.
Memory bus error occurred during the TX transfer.
End of RXD buffer reached.
End of TXD buffer reached.
Granted transaction completed.
Semaphore acquired.
SPIS events.
Shortcut between END event and ACQUIRE task.
Shortcut between DMA.RX.MATCH0 event and DMA.RX.ENABLEMATCH1 task.
Shortcut between DMA.RX.MATCH1 event and DMA.RX.ENABLEMATCH2 task.
Shortcut between DMA.RX.MATCH2 event and DMA.RX.ENABLEMATCH3 task.
Shortcut between DMA.RX.MATCH3 event and DMA.RX.ENABLEMATCH0 task.
Shortcut between DMA.RX.MATCH0 event and DMA.RX.DISABLEMATCH0 task.
Shortcut between DMA.RX.MATCH1 event and DMA.RX.DISABLEMATCH1 task.
Shortcut between DMA.RX.MATCH2 event and DMA.RX.DISABLEMATCH2 task.
Shortcut between DMA.RX.MATCH3 event and DMA.RX.DISABLEMATCH3 task.
All SPIS shortcuts.
SPIS shortcuts.
Interrupt on END event.
Interrupt on ACQUIRED event.
Interrupt on DMA.RX.READY event.
Interrupt on DMA.RX.BUSERROR event.
Interrupt on DMA.RX.MATCH0 event.
Interrupt on DMA.RX.MATCH1 event.
Interrupt on DMA.RX.MATCH2 event.
Interrupt on DMA.RX.MATCH3 event.
Interrupt on DMA.TX.READY event.
Interrupt on DMA.TX.BUSERROR event.
Interrupt on ENDRX event.
Interrupt on ENDTX event.

enumvalue.name: NRF_SPIS_ALL_INTS_MASK
enumvalue.initializer:
= NRF_SPIS_INT_END_MASK | NRF_SPIS_INT_ACQUIRED_MASK
| NRF_SPIS_INT_RXREADY_MASK | NRF_SPIS_INT_RXBUSERROR_MASK | NRF_SPIS_INT_RXMATCH0_MASK | NRF_SPIS_INT_RXMATCH1_MASK | NRF_SPIS_INT_RXMATCH2_MASK | NRF_SPIS_INT_RXMATCH3_MASK | NRF_SPIS_INT_TXREADY_MASK | NRF_SPIS_INT_TXBUSERROR_MASK | NRF_SPIS_INT_ENDRX_MASK | NRF_SPIS_INT_ENDTX_MASK

briefdescription.para: All SPIS interrupts.
SPIS interrupts.
SCK active high, sample on leading edge of clock.
SCK active high, sample on trailing edge of clock.
SCK active low, sample on leading edge of clock.
SCK active low, sample on trailing edge of clock.
SPI modes.
Most significant bit shifted out first.
Least significant bit shifted out first.
SPI bit orders.
Semaphore is free.
Semaphore is assigned to the CPU.
Semaphore is assigned to the SPI slave.
Semaphore is assigned to the SPI, but a handover to the CPU is pending.
SPI semaphore status.
TX buffer over-read detected and prevented.
RX buffer overflow detected and prevented.
SPIS status.
Function for activating the specified SPIS task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task to be activated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified SPIS task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The specified task.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified task register.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the specified SPIS event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be cleared.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the SPIS event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified SPIS event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The specified event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_spis_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_spis_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_spis_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the subscribe configuration for a given SPIS task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to subscribe events.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the subscribe configuration for a given SPIS task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the subscribe configuration for a given SPIS task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the publish configuration for a given SPIS event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to publish the event.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the publish configuration for a given SPIS event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the publish configuration for a given SPIS event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the SPIS peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the SPIS peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the SPIS peripheral is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The SPIS is enabled.
The SPIS is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the SPIS semaphore status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the SPIS status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPIS_Type *p_reg, uint32_t sck_pin, uint32_t mosi_pin, uint32_t miso_pin, uint32_t csn_pin)
memberdef.name: nrf_spis_pins_set

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring SPIS pins.

detaileddescription.para: If a given signal is not needed, pass the NRF_SPIS_PIN_NOT_CONNECTED value instead of its pin number.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
SCK pin number.
MOSI pin number.
MISO pin number.
CSN pin number.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the SCK pin.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
SCK pin number.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the MOSI pin.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
MOSI pin number.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the MISO pin.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
MISO pin number.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the CSN pin.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
CSN pin number.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the SCK pin selection.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the MOSI pin selection.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the MISO pin selection.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the CSN pin selection.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the transmit buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the buffer that contains the data to send.
Maximum number of data bytes to transmit.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the receive buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the buffer for received data.
Maximum number of data bytes to receive.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the transmit buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the receive buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the transmit buffer size.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the receive buffer size.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the number of bytes transmitted in the last granted transaction.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the number of bytes received in the last granted transaction.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the SPI configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
SPI mode.
SPI bit order.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the default character.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Default character that is clocked out in case of an overflow of the RXD buffer.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the over-read character.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Over-read character that is clocked out in case of an over-read of the TXD buffer.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the TX list feature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the TX list feature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the RX list feature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the RX list feature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling individual pattern match filters.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of pattern match filter.
True if pattern match filter is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified pattern match filter is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of pattern match filter.
Pattern match filter is enabled.
Pattern match filter is disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling one-shot operation for the specified match filter.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of pattern match filter.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling one-shot operation for the specified match filter.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of pattern match filter.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if specified pattern match filter is configured as one-shot.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of pattern match filter.
Pattern match filter is configured as one-shot.
Pattern match filter is configured as continuous.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the pattern to be looked for by the specified match filter.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of pattern match filter.
Pattern to be looked for. Match will trigger the corresponding event, if enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the pattern that the specified match filter is looking for.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of pattern match filter.

simplesect.para: Pattern that the specified match filter is looking for.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the termination of the RX transaction after detecting the BUSERROR event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the termination of the RX transaction after detecting the BUSERROR event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if RX transaction termination after detecting the BUSERROR event is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
RX transaction termination after detecting a BUSERROR event is enabled.
RX transaction termination after detecting a BUSERROR event is disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the termination of the TX transaction after detecting the BUSERROR event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the termination of the TX transaction after detecting the BUSERROR event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if TX transaction termination after detecting the BUSERROR event is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
TX transaction termination after detecting a BUSERROR event is enabled.
TX transaction termination after detecting a BUSERROR event is disabled.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether dedicated DMA register is present.
Symbol indicating whether TX list is present.
Symbol indicating whether RX list is present.
Symbol indicating whether SPIS DMA tasks and events are present.
Maximum number of RX patterns.
Macro getting pointer to the structure of registers of the SPIS peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: SPIS instance index.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the SPIS peripheral.

briefdescription.para: This value can be used as a parameter for the nrf_spis_pins_set function to specify that a given SPI signal (SCK, MOSI, or MISO) shall not be connected to a physical pin.
Hardware access layer for managing the SPIS peripheral.
